questions.question: What is the main subject doing in this clip?
questions.answer_key: A person is jogging or running along a fenced path.
questions.rationale: Identifies the primary action and establishes the main activity of the clip.

questions.question: What type of setting or location is shown?
questions.answer_key: A rural or farm area with wooden and chain-link fences.
questions.rationale: Establishes the outdoor rural/farm environment essential to understanding the scene.

questions.question: What animal is visible in the clip?
questions.answer_key: A dog is lying on the ground near the fence.
questions.rationale: Identifies the animal present, relevant to the Pets & Animals category.

questions.question: What is the person wearing?
questions.answer_key: A green shirt, dark shorts, and athletic shoes.
questions.rationale: Describes the runner's attire, helping listeners visualize the scene clearly.

questions.question: What structures enclose the area where the person is running?
questions.answer_key: Wooden rail fences and chain-link fencing.
questions.rationale: Describes the enclosure type, important for understanding the confined farm/rural setting.
